---
name: platform-api-payload-planner
description: Use to translate a campaign into a platform-ready Markdown launch packet for Google, Meta, TikTok, LinkedIn, or Microsoft Ads.
---
# Platform API Payload Planner

## Process

1. Identify platform objective and campaign type.
2. Map creative assets to platform fields.
3. Define budget, dates, targeting, destination, and tracking.
4. Define reporting query or export plan.
5. Write a dry-run packet before live API execution.

## Output

```markdown
# Platform Packet

## Platform
## Objective
## Campaign structure
## Assets
## Targeting
## Budget
## Destination
## Tracking
## Reporting
## Pause rules
```
